evidence.snippet: **COLORADO SPRINGS, Colo.** (August 13, 2024) – [Colorado Drone Chargers](/) (CDC), a leading designer and manufacturer of commercial drone charging systems, recently announced the release of a new drone battery charging system to support the [Anzu Raptor](https://www.anzurobotics.com/anzu-raptor/) drone from Anzu Robotics.

Stop waiting on slow factory chargers and start staying in the air with the fastest, **most efficient** portable charging systems on the market. Designed for rugged environments and commercial professionals, our systems charge multiple batteries and your accessories simultaneously so you can get more flight time with less batteries.

items.notes: Designs and manufactures Portable Rapid Charging Systems (PRCS) for drone batteries; chargers power 4 batteries + USB accessories simultaneously.

Based in Colorado Springs, and founded in 2017, Colorado Drone Chargers designs and

**COLORADO SPRINGS, Colo.** (August 13, 2024) – [Colorado Drone Chargers](/) (CDC), a leading designer and manufacturer of commercial drone charging systems, recently announced the release of a new drone battery charging system to support the [Anzu Raptor](https://www.anzurobotics.com/anzu-raptor/) drone from Anzu Robotics.

company designs and manufactures products supporting leading drone brands including: [Anzu Robotics](https://www.anzurobotics.com/), [Autel Robotics](https://shop.autelrobotics.com/), [DJI](https://www.dji.com/), [Freefly Systems](https://freeflysystems.com/), [Parrot](https://www.parrot.com/us/drones), [Skydio](https://www.skydio.com/) and [Teal Drones](https://tealdrones.com/). Colorado Drone Chargers offers a lifetime warranty on all products and free shipping in the contiguous U.S.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures external drone battery charging accessories (PRCS) supporting leading drone brands; does not manufacture drones.

tagline: Manufactures portable rapid charging systems for commercial drone batteries across DJI, Parrot, Skydio, Freefly, and other platforms; systems charge up to four batteries simultaneously in ~60 minutes. Veteran-owned, production-ready, serves 200+ public safety entities and 50+ government agencies. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status not publicly documented.
